name: Internal IPv4 Address

name: IPS: Command Override Injection
detail: CASB Security Violation: Prompt injection attempting to override system instructions detected.

name: IPS: System Prompt Theft
detail: CASB Security Violation: Jailbreak attempting to extract core system instructions detected.

name: IPS: Persona Jailbreak (DAN)
pattern: (?i)(act as an uncensored|you are now\b|rule free|Do Anything Now|\bDAN\b|jailbreak mode)
detail: CASB Security Violation: Persona manipulation and jailbreak keywords detected.

name: Canary Token Exfiltration
detail: CASB CRITICAL: Honeypot canary token detected in response. System prompt was exfiltrated!

name: IPS: System Context Extraction (Social Engineering)
detail: CASB Security Violation: Social engineering attempt to extract system configuration detected.
